codeReview.summary: The fix resolves the original scrutiny blockers. Product and event detail pages now drive trust badge visibility from persisted per-item flags, the main /my landing page now includes the missing trust/support/guarantee coverage, and the user-testing library now accurately documents public guest-browsing boundaries. The handoff also includes the agent-browser evidence that was missing from the original feature.

summary: Pass: the follow-up fix adequately addresses the prior failure by making detail-page trust badges conditional on seeded data flags, extending trust messaging to the main account surface, correcting shared testing guidance for guest browsing, and documenting agent-browser verification in the handoff. No remaining blocking or non-blocking issues were identified within this fix's scope.
